name: Yuletide Ginger Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups QUAKER Oat Bran Hot Cereal (uncooked)
1/4 cup Red or green sugar crystals
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar, corn syrup, and margarine until fluffy.
3. Blend in egg whites.
4. Gradually add oat bran, flour, ginger, baking soda, and cinnamon; mix well.
5. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in colored sugar crystals to coat.
7. Place the cookie balls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Gently press down on each ball to form a circle about 2 inches wide.
9. Bake for 11-13 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
10. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet, then transfer to a wire rack.
11. Let cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
Makes about 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
